_comment: Edit this file to add/remove feeds. 'kind': 'rss' for a direct agency/institution feed, 'google_news' for a Google News RSS search query (used to fill global gaps where an agency has no public feed). Nothing here costs money — all endpoints are free public feeds.

feeds.name: Google News
feeds.query: (car OR vehicle OR vehicles OR SUV OR "luxury cars") (seized OR seizure OR forfeited OR confiscated)

feeds.name: Google News
feeds.query: (yacht OR superyacht OR vessel OR boat) (seized OR seizure OR forfeited OR confiscated)

feeds.name: Google News
feeds.query: ("private jet" OR aircraft OR airplane OR helicopter) (seized OR seizure OR forfeited OR confiscated)

feeds.name: Google News
feeds.query: (mansion OR villa OR estate OR property OR properties) (seized OR seizure OR forfeited OR confiscated)

feeds.name: Google News
feeds.query: ("bank accounts" OR cash OR funds OR assets) (frozen OR seized OR forfeited) sanctions

feeds.name: Google News
feeds.query: (bitcoin OR cryptocurrency OR crypto OR ethereum OR "digital assets") (seized OR seizure OR forfeited OR confiscated)

feeds.name: Google News
feeds.query: Interpol OR Europol OR "asset recovery" seized assets
